# pexip_infinity_system_tuneable (Resource)

Manages a system tuneable (global setting) configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_system_tuneable" "example" {
  name    = "max_conference_participants"
  setting = "100"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the system tuneable parameter. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `setting` (String) The value of the system tuneable parameter.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the system tuneable
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the system tuneable
